chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS Before: Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Riazat Ali Sahar [C.P. No.D-683 of 2025 (Gulsher v. Province of Sindh & others) Petitioner: Gulsher through Mr. Asif Ali Solangi Advocate. Respondents: Province of Sindh and others through Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Wali Muhammad. Date hearing & decision: 24.12.2025. O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J: - The petitioner has filed a Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking directions to respondents No.5-8/ Special Team to conduct a free, fair, and impartial investigation and submit a report to the SSP Sanghar. Respondents No.9 to 12 were to cooperate in collecting evidence against the accused who murdered the petitioner’s son. The Investigating Officer (I.O.) stated the case is under investigation and submitted that this Court cannot intervene at this stage and request for referring the matter to the learned Magistrate for appropriate orders after investigation. In view of the above facts and without touching the merits, the I.O. is directed to conduct a fair and impartial investigation, free from influence or fear, and submit proper report to the Magistrate by collecting all evidence if any, who shall then pass a speaking order after hearing the parties. The petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
